claim_scope: Admitted first slice only: root init, DB mutation via admitted sqlite3 adapter, live MCP plan_init/admit_task/read_task, and evidence readback.

checks.name: mcp_tools_present
checks.summary: tools/list includes site_task_lifecycle.plan_init, site_task_lifecycle.admit_task, and site_task_lifecycle.read_task.

checks.name: plan_init_smoke
checks.summary: plan_init returned Narada proper paths with sourceStateImported=false and packageExecutedSqliteMutation=false.

checks.name: read_task_smoke
checks.summary: read_task returned narada-proper.task-0005-smoke with task row, evidence refs, and admission event without mutation.

checks.name: db_readback
checks.summary: SQLite readback confirmed narada-proper.task-0003 and narada-proper.task-0005-smoke admitted rows, plus smoke evidence refs and event.
